_publications._publicationTitle: Machine Learning of Allosteric Effects: The Analysis of Ligand-Induced Dynamics to Predict Functional Effects in TRAP1.

_contextSnippet: showing a significant r² value of 0.71 for the KNB model...r² values obtained from linear regression analyses are also shown for each set of predictions
details: Linear regression models achieved r² values ranging from 0.11-0.71, with KNB model on extended training set showing the highest correlation (r² = 0.71) between ML predictions and experimental inhibition data
